# Copilot Instructions

This project is a modern, premium Doctor Appointment System landing page built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Project Overview

The landing page features a clean, healthcare-focused design with the following sections:
- Responsive navbar with branding and navigation
- Hero section with search bar and CTA
- Features section highlighting key benefits
- Featured doctors grid
- Call-to-action section
- Footer

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Icons**: Lucide React
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Project Setup Completed

- Vite React project scaffolded with TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS configured with PostCSS
- Lucide React icons installed
- Premium landing page component created
- All styling uses Tailwind classes only (no external UI libraries)

## Running the Project

```bash
npm install       # Install dependencies (already done)
npm run dev      # Start development server
npm run build    # Build for production
npm run preview  # Preview production build
```

The development server runs at `http://localhost:5173/`

## Color Scheme

- **Primary Green**: #16a34a (Tailwind green-600)
- **Hover Green**: #15803d (Tailwind green-700)
- **Background Gradient**: from-green-50 to-white
- **Text**: text-gray-800 (dark text)
- **Secondary Text**: text-gray-500

## Design Features

- Mobile-first responsive design
- Smooth transitions and hover effects
- Soft shadows and rounded corners (rounded-2xl)
- Grid-based layout
- Premium, modern aesthetic

## Component Structure

- **LandingPage**: Main component in `src/components/LandingPage.tsx`
- Responsive sections with reusable elements
- Sample doctor data with placeholder images
- Search functionality (UI ready)

## Development Notes

- All styles are handled by Tailwind CSS via `src/index.css`
- No external UI component libraries used
- Images use Unsplash for demo purposes
- Component is fully TypeScript with proper types
